purpose: Controlled trial fixtures for the thin M62 task acceptance MVP runner.

fixtures.name: valid-with-warning
fixtures.description: Valid package with non-blocking warning via known limitations.

fixtures.name: missing-evidence
fixtures.description: Required evidence file is intentionally missing.

fixtures.name: missing-expected-artifact
fixtures.description: Expected artifact is declared but absent.

fixtures.name: forbidden-path-changed
fixtures.description: Changed files include forbidden future-milestone path.

fixtures.name: human-review-disabled
fixtures.description: Input attempts to disable mandatory human review.

fixtures.name: not-enough-evidence
fixtures.description: Evidence exists but lacks sufficient correlation and summary.
